title: Help! How can I see emails marked Private Email with our gmail connection automation
excerpt: All emails are marked “Private Email” Can anyone help me understand with how to make the email and communication visible?  My colleague and I both have admin rights.

posts.author: MicahMoseley (Micah)

Each user will need to share their emails
